ham: Hello, this is a reminder that our broadband engineer will visit your premises on 15th April at 10:30 AM to perform routine maintenance. Please ensure a staff member is present. For changes, contact support at <URL>.
spam: URGENT: Your electricity bill not paid. Power will be cutt off tonight 11:00 PM. Pay now to avoid disconnection. Call 12345 or visit <URL> for paymnet. Reply STOP to opt out.
